domain: Gogh adapts six frontend design skills into a source-cited advisory brain for AI coding agents: taste-skill v2, make-interfaces-feel-better, Impeccable, Anthropic frontend-design, ui-ux-pro-max, and Vercel web-design-guidelines. The adapter layer imports captured SKILL.md material, validates raw-source hashes, builds a deterministic skill registry, diffs upstream captures, and renders project-brief stack advice with dial settings, coverage, sources, and audit cues.
raw_input_types: Captured upstream skill files under .raw/skills/<id>/ with .raw/.manifest.json sha256 provenance
A Gogh project brief JSON object covering project type, brand maturity, motion, density, and accessibility posture
The source ledger and rendered vault notes used to keep six-skill claims cited and refreshable

domain_adapted_requires: one real domain importer or ingestion path
one fixture per supported input type
tests for importer, synthesis, rendering, malformed input, and missing credentials
